MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-22-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JOSHUA RUIZ'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE.
